articles.title: An extensive look into North Korean leader Kim Jong Un's background and his regime
articles.description: CNN's Brian Todd takes an extensive look into North Korean leader Kim Jong Un's background and his regime.

articles.author: Jim Sciutto, Chief National Security Correspondent
articles.title: US source: North Korean leader in grave danger after surgery
articles.description: The US is monitoring intelligence that North Korea's leader, Kim Jong Un, is in grave danger after a surgery, according to a US official with direct knowledge.

articles.author: Opinion by Garry Kasparov
articles.title: Trump is weakening America's immune system
articles.description: Garry Kasparov writes that Donald Trump has spent his time in office weakening the institutions that hold him in check and setting the US up for a disaster when those institutions are needed more than ever.
articles.content:

articles.author: Analysis by James Griffiths, CNN
articles.title: As coronavirus crisis passes, Hong Kong might be set for more mass protests
articles.description: The coronavirus pandemic has put a damper on many activities, including Hong Kong's anti-government protests.
articles.content:
Hong Kong (CNN)The coronavirus pandemic has put a damper on many activities, including Hong Kong's anti-government protests.
